_comment: English strings for preview/anim-stage.html. The zh-CN baseline lives in the ZH map inside that file; any key omitted here falls back to it.
stage.lede: One class, one motion. All of it driven by tokens.
stage.card1d: Work out what you're saying before you worry about how it looks.
stage.card2d: 31 layouts, covering nearly every case you'll hit.
stage.card3d: 36 themes, switched by swapping one variable file.
stage.card5d: Speaker notes live in .notes — press S to open them.
stage.card6d: One command renders every slide to PNG.
